note: APPEND-ONLY. Authenticated approval-route closure. Prior evidence (incl. final-head-release.json) untouched. No paid model calls; nothing deployed/pushed/funded/settled/migrated on prod.
supersedes: final-head-release.json (which recorded authenticatedApprovalRouteProven=false — the one open gate; this artifact closes it)

authAndSessionImplementation.nonce: issueNonce → httpOnly sage_nonce cookie (server-minted, single-use window)
authAndSessionImplementation.siweMessage: buildSiweMessage({address, nonce, issuedAt}) — fixed multi-line template (src/lib/auth/message.ts)
authAndSessionImplementation.signatureVerification: viem verifyMessage over the exact SIWE message; nonce read from the cookie is the server's source of truth, not the request body
authAndSessionImplementation.sessionRead: getSessionAddress() — HMAC verify + SESSION_TTL_MS(7d); returns null on missing/tampered/expired; DEV bypass only when NODE_ENV=development && DEV_SESSION_WALLET (neither set here)
authAndSessionImplementation.routeGuard: POST /api/launch/[id]/approve — 401 no/forged session on a real-founder job, 403 different wallet, then current-revision + expectedRevision + verifyPlanForApproval + checkRevisionPolicyForApproval + approveRevision

immutableApprovalRecord.note: exactly one revision ever approved across the whole matrix (replay is idempotent, never approves another); the bound record carries founder wallet, revision, missionPlanDigest, productMapDigest, totalBudgetBase/missionCount/totalCompletions, model+provider provenance, and verificationPolicyDigest/version/required

sessionCannotOverride: text/body values for founder, revision, budget, plan digest, and policy digest are ignored — the founder comes from the verified session, the revision/digests/budget are recomputed from the current revision's own plan; body_override_ignored → 200 approving the SERVER-derived revision, not the attacker's

routeToMoneyComposition.path: authenticated-approved revision → attachApprovedPolicyToCampaign(uses the approved revision) → real campaign row → loadVerifiedCampaignPolicy → fresh lease-bound reproduced permit → settleApprovedSubmission → central settlement sink
routeToMoneyComposition.meaning: the money sink fires exactly once for a fresh reproduced permit off the authenticated approval; after-state drift (HOLD), stale permit (>300s), post-approval policy tamper, and the immutable covenant with replay-mode off all keep the spy at zero

real: issueNonce + buildSiweMessage + viem verifyMessage + mintSession + getSessionAddress (genuine SIWE, no auth logic mocked)
POST /api/launch/[id]/approve handler (the actual route module, called directly)
runInspectionJob + semantic compiler + grounding + canonical gate + allocator (seeds a real current revision)
settleApprovedSubmission + verifyReplayPermit (lease-bound CAS + 300s freshness + runner version) + immutable covenant
mocked: next/headers cookies() — an in-memory jar ONLY (auth INFRASTRUCTURE, not auth LOGIC: the real cookies still carry the real nonce + real HMAC session)
provider LLM boundary — retained payloads only (closure-v2 architect-draft + critic-verdicts); ZERO paid inference
reconcile / telegram / founder-notify / x402 fee — side-effect stubs
inspect / field-test / github / inspection-replay external effects
the replay journal in the money negatives (controllable, to drive stale/drift deterministically)

founderCanaryReadyReason: all 9 proof fields are true — including authenticatedApprovalRouteProven, the one gate that was FALSE in final-head-release.json. The actual approval HTTP route now passes its full matrix under a genuinely-verified SIWE session (real nonce → real signature → real HMAC session → real getSessionAddress), and that authenticated approval composes deterministically to the money sink firing exactly once with every negative at zero. productionDeployed stays FALSE by sprint stop-condition: no deploy/push/prod-migration/funding/settlement was performed.
secretsRecorded: none — no private key, session secret, signature, raw cookie, retained model payload, or private evidence is written to any artifact (only the derived public ephemeral address + public digests)
